title: Huawei makes 1.4nm chip??
summary: Caleb Writes Code discusses Huawei's announcement of the Tau Scaling Law as a competitive response in the hardware race between China and the USA. The video covers advances in EUV and DUV lithography, chip packaging, and logic folding techniques driving the semiconductor industry forward.
